---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of the problem.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Click on ...
3. Enter ...
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, attach screenshots or paste the relevant browser console output.

## Environment

- Browser and version: [e.g. Chrome 126, Safari 17]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Device: [desktop / laptop / mobile]
- Deployment: [privacyfilter.app / self-hosted commit SHA]

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant.
